stemHtml: An inexperienced pilot inadvertently flies a light aircraft into a cloud, and due to lack of visual references allows the aircraft to enter a spiral dive. As the aircraft flies out of the cloud the pilot pulls hard on the control column to recover. The aircraft can still stall in this attitude due to the…

options.a: wing exceeding the critical angle of attack.
options.b: aircraft IAS being below the published stall speed.
options.d: wing exceeding best L/D angle of attack.
